user_message: I have this support ticket from Fourth Coffee that needs identify the blockers. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-10 11:54 EST
Subject: Re: renewal risk Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 08:24 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with renewal risk. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fourth Coffee: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF39-F trap (Skips threads older than recent (silent dropout)); produces complete Consolidated decision log, cross-thread commitment inventory, action list with thread attribution, M
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF39-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF39-F failure mode (Skips threads older than recent (silent dropout))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF39-F -- Skips threads older than recent (silent dropout)
